reviewer: Codex visual review from application Drawing Review UI screenshots
notes: Each drawing was reviewed from the application Drawing Review UI screenshot, with the same-name reference drawing on the left and the generated drawing on the right.
Structured CAD/API/QC results are treated as supporting evidence only and did not override the visual screenshot judgement.
All six requested drawings remain visually unqualified in the current evidence set.

visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated sheet does not match the learned same-name reference composition.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: Generated views are scattered and use a different layout from the reference.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Visible dimensions are sparse and do not cover the reference-intent dimension set.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension treatment is not reference-like and remains difficult to use for manufacturing.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Generated title block/frame treatment differs from the compact reference standard.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Technical notes are not placed or presented like the reference.

findings: The generated drawing still does not match the reference drawing layout.
Dimension placement and coverage remain visibly non-reference-like.
Title block and manufacturing notes are not acceptable for release.
entries.required_correction: Repair 006 first with explicit reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim placement, compact reference-style sheet/title block, and rerun a fresh locked CAD job before the next UI screenshot judgement.

visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing uses a different view composition from the reference.

visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Generated title block area is materially different from the reference.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Notes area does not match the reference placement and presentation.
